_schema: Breakdown interruption: your machine died mid-order, this is the call to Roy's shop. 6-beat structure; Mechanic self-fix check with both branches as content; all outcomes feed county memory flags.

intro.speaker: roy
intro.text:
Let me guess. The 2010.

Yeah, I know that sound.

options.text: "Hold the part for me. I can get it running."
options.label: [Mechanic 40]

options.text: "Send your guy. I need it moving today."  ($150)
"Leave it for now. I can't spend on it today."  (order loses 2 days)

fixed_self.speaker: roy
fixed_self.text:
Well.

I was fixing to sell you a service call.

bodged_it.speaker: roy
bodged_it.text:
Forty minutes ain't nothing.

Means you were close.

Parts'll be eighty.

options.text: (Pay for the parts and get back to it)

shop_fix.speaker: roy
shop_fix.text:
I'll send Caleb.

He'll get you moving.

Paperwork'll catch up.

it_sits.speaker: roy
it_sits.text:
Your machine.

Weather don't usually get cheaper, though.
